summary: Payroll/wage type calculator with pre-filled wage types and a summary overview showing Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, and Auszahlung.

new_feature_requests.summary: Show summary overview (Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, Auszahlung) below wage types

Make the PayrollSummary component visible on the WageCalculator page, rendered directly below the WageEntryTable, so that the summary values (Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, Auszahlung) are always visible without any additional user action.
